title: Warszawa Dome
summary:
Warszawa Dome (62°12′S 58°35′W) is an ice dome rising to 450 m in southwest King George Island, bounded by Ezcurra Inlet, Admiralty Bay, Bransfield Strait and Maxwell Bay. Named by the Polish Antarctic Expedition, 1980, after Warsaw, capital of Poland.
 This article incorporates public domain material from "Warszawa Dome". Geographic Names Information System. United States Geological Survey.
